headline: Nvidia-backed Ayar Labs raises $500 million at $3.75 billion valuation
summary: Nvidia-backed Ayar Labs, which develops chips that transmit data using light, said ‌on Tuesday it has raised $500 million in ‌a series E round at a valuation of $3.75 billion.  The latest ​round, which brings its total funding to $870 million, was led by investment firm Neuberger Berman and involved new investors including ARK Invest, Qatar Investment Authority ‌and 1789 Capital.  Ayar's technology uses ​light ​instead of the traditionally ​used electrical signals, aiming ‌to speed transmission by linking AI computing chips with memory chips, an increasingly valuable prospect as hyperscalers and governments spend hundreds of billions of dollars for achieving AI infrastructure supremacy.
